steps.title: Identify the key clarification
steps.content: The dash introduces “it's little more than timid variations on what's already been.” This reveals the narrator is assessing whether something is new at a core or essential level.

steps.title: Apply the target meaning
steps.content:
Fundamentally directly means essential or core nature, exactly the meaning required.

The other choices don't fit: (A) superficially means surface level (opposite of what's needed), (B) ambivalently refers to emotional conflict (contextually impossible), and (D) frequently means occurring often or regularly (unrelated to essential nature).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
